text: I feel intrigued by the energy and creativity of this space. The glass and neon draw me in with their futuristic promise, while the words 'R+D' spark thoughts about human potential for innovation. Surrounded by thoughtfully designed displays, I am inspired to contemplate how our work and research environments shape our sense of possibility and connection. There is an undercurrent of curiosity and purposeful reflection here that makes me eager to engage and learn.
